name: nimi-mods
description: First-party runtime mods for Nimi desktop runtime.

scripts.generate:spec: pnpm run generate:spec:audio-book-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:kismet-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:knowledge-base-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:local-chat-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:mint-you-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:test-ai-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:narrative-engine-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:textplay-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:videoplay-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:world-studio-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:cashbook-kernel-docs
scripts.check:spec: pnpm run check:spec:audio-book && pnpm run check:spec:kismet && pnpm run check:spec:knowledge-base && pnpm run check:spec:local-chat && pnpm run check:spec:mint-you && pnpm run check:spec:test-ai && pnpm run check:spec:narrative-engine && pnpm run check:spec:textplay && pnpm run check:spec:videoplay && pnpm run check:spec:world-studio && pnpm run check:spec:cashbook
scripts.check:spec:audio-book: pnpm run check:spec:audio-book-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:audio-book-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:kismet: pnpm run check:spec:kismet-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:kismet-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:local-chat: pnpm run check:spec:local-chat-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:local-chat-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:mint-you: pnpm run check:spec:mint-you-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:mint-you-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:test-ai: pnpm run check:spec:test-ai-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:test-ai-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:textplay: pnpm run check:spec:textplay-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:textplay-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:videoplay: pnpm run check:spec:videoplay-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:videoplay-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:cashbook: pnpm run check:spec:cashbook-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:cashbook-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.verify:audio-book: pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-audio-book run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-audio-book run test && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-audio-book run build
scripts.verify:knowledge-base: pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-knowledge-base run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-knowledge-base run test && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-knowledge-base run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-audio-book run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-kismet run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-knowledge-base run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-local-chat run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-mint-you run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-narrative-engine run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-test-ai run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-textplay run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-videoplay run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-world-studio run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-cashbook run typecheck
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-audio-book run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-kismet run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-knowledge-base run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-local-chat run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-mint-you run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-narrative-engine run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-test-ai run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-textplay run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-videoplay run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-world-studio run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-cashbook run clean
scripts.verify: pnpm run check && pnpm run check:spec && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run verify:audio-book && pnpm run verify:kismet && pnpm run verify:knowledge-base && pnpm run verify:local-chat && pnpm run verify:mint-you && pnpm run verify:narrative-engine && pnpm run verify:test-ai && pnpm run verify:textplay && pnpm run verify:videoplay && pnpm run verify:world-studio && pnpm run build -- --all && pnpm run check:dist
